untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on seasonal calendar timing (late February entry for June expiration) and specific contract expiration logic that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators and the allowed operators. Requires calendar date logic and futures contract specification (instrument, expiration month) which are outside the scope of the indicator-based rule engine.
translation_notes: This is a seasonal/calendar-driven strategy rather than a technical indicator strategy. The core logic—buy natural gas futures with June expiration near end of February—requires: (1) calendar date detection, (2) futures contract selection by expiration month, and (3) time-based entry rules. The backtest period claim ('13 consecutive years profitable as of 2008') cannot be validated without external regime/calendar data. A proper implementation would need to extend the engine to support date-based conditions and contract-specific parameters.
